101-109. EFFECTS OF NAVANSAS IN PISCES.
Should Pisces ascend at birth, the various Navansas thereof will yield following specific
effects: Effects of Pisces Ascendant, First Navansa: Though the native may be white in
complexion, his body will reveal the splendour of blood-red hue; he will be soft in disposition,
be akin to a female in mental make up, (i.e. will act, like a female), be fickle-minded and will
have a short neck and emaciated waist. Effects of Pisces Ascendant, Second Navansa: The
native will have a big nose, be skillful in his assignments, will eat meat and the like, be
endowed with a charming physique, will wander in forests and hills and will have a big head.
